title: 🔁 Recursive Truth Feedback
name: Recursive Truth Feedback
what_it_is: A belief loop that reinforces itself so strongly it generates reality—truth birthed through recursive confirmation, immune to contradiction.
how_to_use: she believes it so hard, it becomes true—the feedback completes the loop
his story eats itself—truth born of telling, not fact
animation_behavior: Text repeats louder each cycle, visuals layer deeper into feedback, truth emerges from echo buildup ---
